source_pr.title: disttask: cleanup framework meta when nodes shutdown
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #46258 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
1. Compare nodes stored in infosync and dist_framework_meta when doing cleanUpRoutine.
Then delete legacy nodes.
2. Mock taskManager.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: `mysql.dist_framework_meta` can contain legacy/stale node rows after a TiDB node shuts down, causing nondeterministic behavior in disttask framework cleanup routines.
failure_signature: stale disttask framework meta rows after node shutdown (dist_framework_meta not cleaned)
root_cause_explanation: This case is flaky because disttask framework state is persisted in shared system tables (e.g. `mysql.dist_framework_meta`). When a TiDB node goes down, legacy node metadata can remain, and cleanup routines that compare infosync nodes vs meta table can observe inconsistent/stale state depending on timing and previous runs. The fix adds explicit cleanup of outdated meta rows when replacing dead nodes and introduces `CleanUpMeta(...)` support in the task manager to delete legacy node entries, making the cleanup behavior deterministic.
fix_pattern: Clean up shared disttask meta state when nodes shut down: compare infosync nodes vs `dist_framework_meta`, delete legacy node rows via `TaskManager.CleanUpMeta(...)`, and ensure dead-node replacement also removes stale metadata so subsequent cleanup logic/tests do not depend on leftover shared state.

evidence: evidence: stale rows in `mysql.dist_framework_meta` after node shutdown (shared state cleanup)

files: Makefile, ddl/backfilling_dispatcher.go, ddl/ddl.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/BUILD.bazel, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager_test.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_test.go, disttask/framework/dispatcher/interface.go, disttask/framework/framework_test.go, disttask/framework/mock/BUILD.bazel, disttask/framework/mock/dispatcher_mock.go, disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go, disttask/importinto/dispatcher.go, pkg/ddl/backfilling_dispatcher.go, pkg/ddl/ddl.go, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher.go, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager.go, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_manager_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/dispatcher/interface.go, pkg/disttask/framework/framework_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/mock/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/mock/dispatcher_mock.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/dispatcher.go
